title: Public Identity, Privacy, Security, and Reputation Boundaries · Career Evidence Triage
summary: A realistic public identity, privacy, security, and reputation boundaries artifact contains one plausible targeting, evidence, integrity, access, privacy, process, or decision defect. Locate the first unsupported claim before revising it. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in public-identity threat and disclosure model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Choose a public, selective, private, or live-only evidence channel from audience need, learner safety, and claim purpose.
Inventory personal, third-party, employer, client, research, secret, metadata, and inferred information before publication.
Model impersonation, harassment, discrimination, credential theft, doxxing, scraping, and relationship harm for the learner context.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Purpose
steps.instruction:
debug case — A public profile leaks private email, precise location, commit identity, client screenshots, API history, availability, and a protected personal detail. The debug variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Choose a public, selective, private, or live-only evidence channel from audience need, learner safety, and claim purpose.

Inspect the Audience Purpose trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Purpose.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for choose a public, selective, private, or live-only evidence channel from audience need, learner safety, and claim purpose. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Purpose, keep Audience Purpose connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: For Audience Purpose, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Purpose, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Audience Purpose precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Purpose, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A public profile leaks private email, precise location, commit identity, client screenshots, API history, availability, and a protected personal detail. The debug variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Choose a public, selective, private, or live-only evidence channel from audience need, learner safety, and claim purpose.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Audience Purpose, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Serious candidates must maintain a maximally public personal brand.
